promptDescription: - **lineup** — interactive ranking table that renders inline bar glyphs inside each cell and lets users sort/stack columns by weight. Best when comparing many entities across multiple numeric KPIs simultaneously. Spec: { "type":"lineup", "title":"...", "columns":["name","revenue","cost"], "data":[{"name":"A","revenue":100,"cost":40}] }
renderScript: function(wrap,spec){var C=['#534AB7','#7F77DD','#2E9CDB','#4BC1A8','#E8833A','#E85858','#9B59B6','#27AE60','#F39C12','#1ABC9C','#3498DB','#E74C3C','#2ECC71','#F1C40F','#8E44AD'];function contrastColor(hex){var lin=function(v){v/=255;return v<=0.03928?v/12.92:Math.pow((v+0.055)/1.055,2.4);};var r=lin(parseInt(hex.slice(1,3),16));var g=lin(parseInt(hex.slice(3,5),16));var b=lin(parseInt(hex.slice(5,7),16));return 0.2126*r+0.7152*g+0.0722*b>0.179?'#000000':'#ffffff';}function loadCSS(url){var i,ls=document.getElementsByTagName('link');for(i=0;i<ls.length;i++){if(ls[i].href===url)return;}var l=document.createElement('link');l.rel='stylesheet';l.href=url;document.head.appendChild(l);}function load(url,g,cb){if(window[g]){cb();return;}for(var i=0;i<document.scripts.length;i++){if(document.scripts[i].src===url){if(document.scripts[i]._ld){cb();return;}document.scripts[i].addEventListener('load',cb);return;}}var s=document.createElement('script');s.src=url;s.onload=function(){s._ld=true;cb();};document.head.appendChild(s);}loadCSS('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/lineupjs@4/build/LineUpJS.css');load('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/lineupjs@4/build/LineUpJS.js','LineUpJS',function(){wrap.classList.add('lineup-wrap');if(!wrap.style.height)wrap.style.height='520px';wrap._chartSpec=spec;var rows=spec.data||[];if(!rows.length){wrap.textContent='No data';return;}var colNames=Array.isArray(spec.columns)?spec.columns.map(function(c){return typeof c==='string'?c:c.name;}):Object.keys(rows[0]);var builder=LineUpJS.builder(rows).sidePanel(false);var numColColors=[];var numIdx=0;colNames.forEach(function(col){var sample=rows.find(function(r){return r[col]!=null;});var isNum=typeof(sample?sample[col]:null)==='number';if(isNum){var barColor=C[numIdx++%C.length];var textColor=contrastColor(barColor);numColColors.push({col:col,barColor:barColor,textColor:textColor});var vals=rows.map(function(r){return+r[col];}).filter(function(v){return!isNaN(v);});builder.column(LineUpJS.buildNumberColumn(col,[Math.min.apply(null,vals),Math.max.apply(null,vals)]).color(barColor));}else{builder.column(LineUpJS.buildStringColumn(col));}});builder.defaultRanking();builder.build(wrap);requestAnimationFrame(function(){requestAnimationFrame(function(){window.dispatchEvent(new Event('resize'));if(numColColors.length){var css=numColColors.map(function(nc){var sel='.lu-c-'+CSS.escape(nc.col)+',.lu-c-'+CSS.escape(nc.col.toLowerCase());return sel+' { color: '+nc.textColor+' !important; }\n'+sel+' *:not(svg):not(svg *) { color: '+nc.textColor+' !important; }';}).join('\n');var style=document.createElement('style');style.textContent=css;wrap.appendChild(style);}});});});}
